PlanetScale Hobby Tier Discontinued — all DBs now require paid Scaler Pro March 2024 · Try Neon, Supabase instead Fly.io Free Hobby Plan Killed for new users — only ~2 VM-hrs/7-day trial remains Oct 2024 · Try Render free, Oracle Always Free instead Railway Free Tier No permanent free tier — $5 trial then $5/mo Hobby minimum 2024 · Try Render free, Fly.io legacy instead SendGrid Free Plan Permanent free tier discontinued — replaced with 60-day trial May 2025 · Try Resend, Loops, Mailgun instead Bench Accounting Shut down — acquired by Employer.com Dec 2024 · Try Pilot (paid), Wave (free) instead Pioneer.app Stopped new investments 2024 · Try YC Startup School instead Buildspace Nights & Weekends Shut down — site shows farewell message 2025 · Try YC Startup School instead OpenAI bundle in MS Founders Hub Standalone OpenAI credits removed — must use Azure-routed access 2025 · Try OpenAI Startups Tier 1 directly instead Want 5 startup ideas every day? 100k+ founders get daily ideas, growth hacks and playbooks from Half Baked. Inside: cloud infrastructure credits, fundraising tools, productivity software, AI-credits, legal and security tools, growth and marketing products, and Web3 infrastructure offers. Use this page to reduce startup costs before fundraising, launch, or scaling. Browse Startup Deals Unlock Premium Perks What is the InnMind Startup Perks Database? The InnMind Startup Perks Database is a curated catalog of cloud credits, software discounts, and founder deals for Web3, AI, and tech startups. It helps founders find useful tools for infrastructure, fundraising, productivity, legal, security, analytics, and Web3 development without searching across dozens of provider pages. What founders get A curated catalog of startup deals, credits, and founder perks InnMind curates practical startup offers that can help founders reduce software costs, access cloud credits, test new tools, and unlock useful perks across growth, AI, infrastructure, productivity, fundraising, and operations. This catalog is built for Web3, AI, and tech founders who want to save money, move faster, and discover tools that are actually relevant for building and fundraising. Featured startup deals Hand-picked startup perks, credits, and discounts worth exploring first Explore some of the most valuable startup deals available through InnMind: from cloud credits and fundraising tools to growth software and founder productivity apps. These featured offers can help early-stage Web3, AI, and tech founders reduce costs, move faster, and get more value from their InnMind membership. Cloud Credits Google Cloud Startup Credits Claim up to $200,000 in Google Cloud credits for Web3 and AI startups. Secure scalable serverless infrastructure, database hosting, and high-performance computing to extend your runway and ship products faster. View deal Productivity Intercom AI Support (90% Off) Get a massive 90% off Intercom for your 1 year, including powerful Fin AI customer service agent. Perfect setup for growing startups to automate user onboarding & deliver premium inbound support on a bootstrapped budget. View deal Fundraising Tools DocSend Startup Discount (90% Off) Get a 90% discount on DocSend’s virtual data room. Securely share your startup pitch deck, track investor engagement with advanced document analytics, and manage your fundraising outreach effectively. View deal Cloud & Infra Rabata AI Storage Grant ($100K) Apply for up to $100,000 in enterprise cloud storage credits for your Generative AI startup. Store AI datasets, train models, manage inference workloads, and reduce infrastructure costs with high-performance S3-compatible storage. View deal Cloud & Infra Microsoft Azure & OpenAI ($150k Credits) Claim up to $150,000 in Azure credits + access to industry-leading OpenAI models. A massive runway extension for AI & tech founders who need to scale enterprise-grade infrastructure without burning early capital. View deal Productivity tl;dv AI Meeting Notetaker Get 30% off for 6 months on tl;dv. Automate your meeting transcription, generate AI summaries for investor calls, and save hours on admin work so you can focus on execution. View deal More startup deals are available inside InnMind, including offers from AWS, HubSpot, DigitalOcean, and other tools founders use across fundraising, growth, and operations. Looking to feature your own product or service for startup founders? Apply here to join the InnMind startup deals ecosystem. Browse all startup deals Explore startup perks, cloud credits, software discounts, and founder tools across fundraising, growth, productivity, AI, and operations. Each deal links to its full offer page on InnMind. Government fees are excluded. For startups under 25 people building real products on AI voice, from agents to apps. Explore Latest Deals STARTCAMP FAQs Grow Your Startup With Confidence StartCamp simplifies the journey from idea to scale by giving founders access to the best software deals, exclusive credits, and essential tools. Our mission is to make building and growing your startup more affordable, efficient, and connected. Think of us as your go-to resource for startup success. What is StartCamp? StartCamp is a startup-focused community that helps founders and entrepreneurs accelerate their journey with exclusive software deals, free credits, perks, and essential resources. By partnering with leading SaaS companies, we deliver unmatched savings and benefits designed to fuel early-stage growth. As a community-driven platform, our mission is simple: to make it easier, faster, and more affordable for startups to get off the ground and scale with confidence. What kind of deals does StartCamp offer? StartCamp provides exclusive deals on SaaS products and essential software tools widely used by startups and entrepreneurs. From marketing and sales platforms to cloud hosting, productivity, and finance tools, our curated offers cover every stage of building and scaling a business. With access to significant discounts and free credits, startups can save money on vital tools while focusing resources on growth and innovation. Can I try StartCamp for free? Yes! StartCamp offers a Free Plan designed specifically for early-stage startups and entrepreneurs. It’s the perfect way to explore our platform, access essential tools, and claim curated deals without any upfront cost. With the Free Plan, you can start building your startup toolkit right away and experience how StartCamp supports your journey from idea to growth.
